title: Vaaniyah
description: 150 Vanilla+ mods that make your game look and run smoother
body:
A Modpack of 150 mods which improve your game experience with optimizations and Vanilla-friendly additions.
Everything is very lightweight and add the option to play with friends online without a server (e4mc)

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c13080e3385c84e84cf7b0cb7b3620e21e741f93.png)

## Performance
Built on Fabric, Sodium, Iris, Lithium, Culling, etc...

## Sounds
Birds sounds, Thunder, UI navigation sounds adds a lot to immersion

## Mobs
New creepers, endermen, zombies and even villagers variants

## Quality of Life
UI overhaul, player graves or even simple bug fixes

## World Generation
New biomes, new structures but not too much

## Multiplayer
e4mc and lan tools are included and allow you to play online or offline with friends for free
